author: Sun Hongkai and Liu Lu, eds.
title: Nuzu yuyan jianzhi (Nusuyu) [Brief description of the Nusu language of the Nu people]
notes: Body-parts entered include animal parts, some verbs, and other scattered terms.  Both dialects not in ZMYYC or TBL, so should be entered in full.  A few words are not from wordlist but from examples.
